title: Magically Smoky Dutch Peanut Cookies Stew
description: A smoky one-pot Dutch dish featuring peanut cookies, sashimi-cut vegetables, and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients, this stew is a unique and delicious meal option.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium heat and add the crushed peanut cookies to toast for 5 minutes.
Add the sashimi-cut onion, carrots, and zucchini to the pot and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 20 minutes.
Crack in the eggs and stir gently to distribute the egg throughout the stew.
Season the stew with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer the stew for an additional 5 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
